prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次依次为 6764→7869→6204→8357→8285，整体呈波动后移趋势，近 3 年累计后移约 2000 名；2025 年基准约 8285 名；该校在黑龙江省物理类招生计划 2021–2023 年均为 83 人，2024 年 82 人，2025 年 83 人；2026 年计划仍为 83 人，与 2025 年持平，计划层面无扩缩变动。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北大学（含秦皇岛分校）为 985、211、双一流高校；软科主榜排名近年稳定在 37–39 名，属全国顶尖工科院校；2026 年声誉评价中性/混合，主要涉及校区认知争议；抖音热度排名第 82（一般），短视频曝光量偏低；未见明显投档断档记录；依托东北大学本部，控制科学与工程 A+、计算机科学与技术 A、冶金工程 A、机械工程 A-、材料科学与工程 A-、软件工程 A-，工科实力突出，与该校计算机类、自动化类、机械类等招生专业高度对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业在 2026 年专业热度分析中持续高热推荐；黑龙江省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 16.7 万，按近年比例估算物理类约 11.4 万人，较 2025 年（11.74 万）减少约 3000 人，竞争略有缓解；该校位于河北省秦皇岛市，在黑龙江省属跨省招生，无本地倾斜；2025 年物理类招生 83 人占该校在黑龙江总计划的约 76%，属主力科类。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026 年招生计划持平、黑龙江省物理类考生小幅减少及工科专业持续高热，预计 2026 年最低录取位次在 2025 年基准 8285 名基础上略有前移（竞争略缓）；预测最低位次约 8255 名，区间 7755–8755 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 6764→7869→6204→8357→8285, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2000 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 8285; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Heilongjiang Province was 83 students from 2021 to 2023, 82 in 2024, and 83 in 2025; the 2026 plan remains 83 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction at the plan level.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University (including Qinhuangdao Campus) is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has been stable at 37–39 in recent years, belonging to the top engineering universities nationwide; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus recognition disputes; Douyin popularity ranking is 82 (average), with low short video exposure; no obvious admission gaps recorded; relying on the main campus of Northeastern University, it has A+ in Control Science and Engineering, A in Computer Science and Technology, A in Metallurgical Engineering, A- in Mechanical Engineering, A- in Materials Science and Engineering, and A- in Software Engineering, with outstanding engineering strength, highly corresponding to its enrollment majors such as Computer Science, Automation, and Mechanical Engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended in the 2026 major popularity analysis; the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Heilongjiang Province in 2026 is about 167,000, with an estimated Physics Category of about 114,000 based on recent proportions, a decrease of about 3,000 compared to 2025 (117,400), slightly easing competition; the university is located in Qinhuangdao City, Hebei Province, and is a cross-provincial enrollment in Heilongjiang, with no local preference; in 2025, the Physics Category enrollment of 83 students accounts for about 76% of the university's total plan in Heilongjiang, making it the main category.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuations, unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, slight decrease in Physics Category candidates in Heilongjiang Province, and sustained high popularity of engineering majors, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (competition slightly eased) based on the 2025 baseline of 8285; the predicted minimum ranking is about 8255, with a range of 7755–8755.

- Automation (Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 7755–8755, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 engineering majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 Computer Science and Technology and Automation as reach options, and Tier 3 Business Administration and Economics as safety choices; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<7755), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors.
